description: EventBridge rules for CandidateMatch automation pipeline. Deploy via AWS CLI or Terraform. Targets can be Lambda (invoking HTTPS with CRON_SECRET) or EventBridge Scheduler API destination to your Amplify app URL.

rules.name: candidatematch-ingest-hourly
rules.description: Ingest jobs from all ATS connectors every hour

target.note: Or use EventBridge Scheduler with API destination; or Lambda ARN that calls this URL

rules.name: candidatematch-match-every-2h
rules.description: Run AI matching every 2 hours after ingestion

rules.name: candidatematch-cleanup-daily
rules.description: Cleanup old data daily at 2 AM UTC

rules.name: candidatematch-gmail-candidate-sync
rules.description: Gmail job-application tracking for all connected candidates every 6 hours

awsCliExamples.note: EventBridge Scheduler (recommended) uses create-schedule with API destination. Example for match (every 2 hours):
awsCliExamples.matchSchedule: aws scheduler create-schedule --group-name candidatematch --name candidatematch-match-every-2h --schedule-expression "rate(2 hours)" --flexible-time-window '{"Mode":"OFF"}' --target '{"Arn":"arn:aws:scheduler:::aws-sdk:http:invoke","RoleArn":"<ROLE_ARN>","Input":"{\"Method\":\"POST\",\"Endpoint\":\"https://YOUR_APP/api/eventbridge/match\",\"Headers\":{\"Authorization\":\"Bearer CRON_SECRET\",\"Content-Type\":\"application/json\"},\"Body\":\"{\\\"mode\\\":\\\"match\\\",\\\"minScore\\\":70,\\\"notifyThreshold\\\":85}\\\"}"}'}'
